webservice.description: Route LLM calls to cheapest model that meets quality bar for the task class
webservice.auth: Bearer token required — returns 401 if missing or invalid

inputs.model: string (optional) — model name; router picks cheapest if omitted
inputs.stream: boolean (optional, default false) — enable SSE streaming

outputs.model: string — ACTUAL model used (may differ from requested if router overrides)
outputs.cost_usd: float — actual cost charged to user's credits

guarantees: Returns 401 if Authorization header missing or token invalid
Returns cost_usd in every non-streaming response (billing transparency)
model field reflects ACTUAL model used, not the requested model
Response time < 30s for prompts under 1000 tokens
Never returns 500 on valid authenticated requests with valid JSON
owasp_guarantees: Malformed JSON body → 401 (auth checked first, before parsing)
Oversized payload (>50KB) → 401 (auth checked first, before size check)
SQL injection in message content → safe response (sanitized, not 500)

frontend_dependencies: web/home.html → YinYang greeting message on login
web/app-store.html → model cost display in app detail view
evidence_notes: CPU tests sealed in GLOW 99. ABCD auth-layer certified in GLOW 101: all 4 model paths (Llama-70B, Mixtral, Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o) return 401 consistently without auth token. Live ABCD pending SOLACE_API_KEY env var.
